user_prompt: Reference images are Brazil and Japan World Cup team medals/emblems. Following the same style and format, generate another World Cup team emblem for Qatar: a soccer ball combined with Qatar flag shield. The shield is the QATAR flag exactly: maroon and white with a NINE-POINT serrated/zigzag vertical dividing line (white on hoist side, maroon on fly side), NOT a straight divide. Centered, ~80% of frame, white background.
